steps.title: Graph or substitute
steps.content: The solution is the intersection of the two graphs. A graphing check should show the same intersection, but algebraically, first rewrite the equations as $y=-x^2$ and $y=8x+16$.

steps.title: Check the choices
steps.content:
• Choice A, $-16$, is the corresponding $y$-value, not the requested $x$-value.
  • Choice B, $-4$, is the intersection's $x$-coordinate. Correct.
  • Choices C and D do not satisfy the squared equation.
That matches choice B, so B is correct.
